zh.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑
zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillipa Arundell於1404年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑時，她的父親Sir John Arundell VI35歲，母親Anora Lambourne31歲。她於大約1425年與Sir William Bodrugan在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1443年2月6日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾可瓦爾享年39歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillipa Arundell于1404年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑时，她的父亲Sir John Arundell VI35岁，母亲Anora Lambourne31岁。她于大约1425年与Sir William Bodrugan在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1443年2月6日在英国英格兰可瓦爾可瓦爾享年39岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillipa Arundell was born in 1404, in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Arundell VI, was 35 and her mother, Anora Lambourne, was 31. She married Sir William Bodrugan about 1425, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 6 February 1443, in Cornwall, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Cornwall, England.

fr.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: St Columb Major, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillipa Arundell est née en 1404, à St Columb Major, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Arundell VI, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anora Lambourne, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Bodrugan environ 1425, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1443, à Cornwall, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Phillipa Arundell 1404 in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Arundell VI 35 und ihre Mutter Anora Lambourne 31. Sie hat um 1425 in Cornwall, England Sir William Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1443 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Cornwall, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cornwall, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir William Bodrugan circa 1425, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 febbraio 1443, nel Cornwall, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillipa Arundellが1404年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャーで生まれた時，父Sir John Arundell VIは35歳，母Anora Lambourneは31歳であった。約1425年にイギリスコルンワルでSir William Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1443年2月6日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルコルンワルで39歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르
ko.lifeSummary: Phillipa Arundell(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Arundell VI(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anora Lambourne(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1425년 영국 코른월에서 Sir William Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 2월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 코른월에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월에 묻혔다.

pt.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Arundell nasceu em 1404, em St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Arundell VI, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anora Lambourne, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Bodrugan aproximadamente 1425, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1443, em Cornwall, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillipa Arundell родилась в 1404 г. в местности ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Arundell VI было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anora Lambourne, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Bodrugan около 1425 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 февраля 1443 г. в местности корнвалл, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности корнвалл, Англия.

Se casó con Sir William Bodrugan aproximadamente 1425, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1443, en Cornwall, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Cornwall, Inglaterra.
